filePath
option.value: /ic_launcher (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <adaptive-icon xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <background android:drawable="@drawable/ic_launcher_background" /> <foreground android:drawable="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" /> <monochrome android:drawable="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" /> </adaptive-icon>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <adaptive-icon xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <background android:drawable="@android:color/transparent" /> <foreground android:drawable="@mipmap/ic_launcher" /> <monochrome android:drawable="@mipmap/ic_launcher" /> </adaptive-icon>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /strings (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name" translatable="false">魔法字典</string> <string name="content_desc_dark_mode">深色模式图标</string> <string name="content_desc_language_setting">语言设置图标</string> <string name="content_desc_info_icon">信息图标</string> <string name="settings_dark_mode">深色模式</string> <string name="settings_about">关于</string> <string name="settings_version_format">版本: %1$s</string> <string name="settings_author_format">创作者: %1$s</string> <string name="settings_repo_label">仓库: </string> <string name="settings_repo_name">GitHub</string> <string name="settings_license_notice">遵循CC BY-NC 4.0协议，严禁商用</string> <string name="settings_links_header">友情链接/参考：</string> <string name="settings_link_madorunes">魔女文网站</string> <string name="settings_link_moegirl">萌娘百科</string> <string name="settings_contributors_header">项目贡献者：</string> <string name="bottom_bar_dict">字典</string> <string name="bottom_bar_converter">转换</string> <string name="bottom_bar_settings">设置</string> <string name="settings_title">设置</string> <string name="settings_language_label">语言</string> <string name="dict_intro_para1">魔女文字（英语：Madoka Runes，又称犬咖喱文）\n是指出现于SHAFT制作的动画《魔法少女小圆》中魔女结界、魔法少女戒指等处的文字，由剧团犬咖喱设计</string> <string name="dict_intro_para2">魔女文字的字符与拉丁字母（包括德文字母，比英文字母多出4个)和阿拉伯数字之间存在一一对应</string> <string name="dict_intro_para3">剧中出现的魔女文字大多用来拼写德文和英文，也有用来拼写日语罗马字、意大利语、拉丁语等其他语言</string> <string name="column_and_row_name">字体/\n字符</string> <string name="ancient_font_name">古代体</string> <string name="modern_font_name">现代体</string> <string name="musical_font_name">音乐体</string> <string name="gothic_font_name">哥特体</string> <string name="converter_intro">你可以在这里将输入的文本转换为转换为魔女文字</string> <string name="converter_input_hint">请输入要转换的文本</string> <string name="font_selection_dialog_title">字体</string> <string name="text_size_selection_dialog_title">字号</string> <string name="text_color">颜色</string> <string name="real_time_preview">实时预览</string> <string name="output_box_hint">转换结果将显示在这里</string> <string name="png_export_button">导出为PNG</string> <string name="svg_export_button">导出为SVG</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name" translatable="false">魔法字典</string> <string name="content_desc_dark_mode">深色模式图标</string> <string name="content_desc_language_setting">语言设置图标</string> <string name="content_desc_info_icon">信息图标</string> <string name="settings_dark_mode">深色模式</string> <string name="settings_about">关于</string> <string name="settings_version_format">版本: %1$s</string> <string name="settings_author_format">创作者: %1$s</string> <string name="settings_repo_label">仓库: </string> <string name="settings_repo_name">GitHub</string> <string name="settings_license_notice">遵循CC BY-NC 4.0协议，严禁商用</string> <string name="settings_links_header">友情链接/参考：</string> <string name="settings_link_madorunes">魔女文网站</string> <string name="settings_link_moegirl">萌娘百科</string> <string name="settings_contributors_header">项目贡献者：</string> <string name="bottom_bar_dict">字典</string> <string name="bottom_bar_converter">转换</string> <string name="bottom_bar_settings">设置</string> <string name="settings_title">设置</string> <string name="settings_language_label">语言</string> <string name="dict_intro_para1">魔女文字（英语：Madoka Runes，又称犬咖喱文）\n是指出现于SHAFT制作的动画《魔法少女小圆》中魔女结界、魔法少女戒指等处的文字，由剧团犬咖喱设计</string> <string name="dict_intro_para2">魔女文字的字符与拉丁字母（包括德文字母，比英文字母多出4个)和阿拉伯数字之间存在一一对应</string> <string name="dict_intro_para3">剧中出现的魔女文字大多用来拼写德文和英文，也有用来拼写日语罗马字、意大利语、拉丁语等其他语言</string> <string name="column_and_row_name">字体/\n字符</string> <string name="ancient_font_name">古代体</string> <string name="modern_font_name">现代体</string> <string name="musical_font_name">音乐体</string> <string name="gothic_font_name">哥特体</string> <string name="converter_intro">你可以在这里将输入的文本转换为转换为魔女文字</string> <string name="converter_input_hint">请输入要转换的文本</string> <string name="font_selection_dialog_title">字体</string> <string name="text_size_selection_dialog_title">字号</string> <string name="text_color">颜色</string> <string name="real_time_preview">实时预览</string> <string name="output_box_hint">转换结果将显示在这里</string> <string name="png_export_button">导出为PNG</string> <string name="svg_export_button">导出为SVG</string> <string name="converter_export_empty_hint">请先输入要转换的文本</string> </resources>
